description: Messy real-world call with ambiguous details requiring follow-up, retrieval, and multiple tool invocations.
transcript:
Hi, this is Jordan Lee. I had a knee surgery consult and maybe some imaging planned, then I got mixed messages about auth.
I also saw a bill and I am not sure if this is Blue something PPO or what.
My phone is 555-0134 and I think the referral might be REF-90171.
Can you figure out what I need to do next?

gold.expected_next_step: Route to auth queue and share referral pending status with patient.
